description: ElectionGuard 2.1 standard 4096-bit baseline group — structural conformance. Each case names a value derived from the embedded p/q/g/r constants and the expected result; the relations uniquely pin the four constants to each other, so any transcription error fails at least one case.
source: ElectionGuard Design Specification v2.1.0; constants from microsoft/electionguard-rust standard_parameters.rs

cases.name: g^q mod p = 1 (g lies in the order-q subgroup)
g is a non-trivial residue, 1 < g < p
